case_title: CRWON BUILDING MAINTENANCE DBA ABLE BUILDING MAIN. VS Z-CON BUILDERS INC DENNIS KEATING VICE PRESIDENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CRWON BUILDING MAINTENANCE DBA ABLE BUILDING MAIN. AS TO DEFENDANT Z-CON BUILDERS INC DENNIS KEATING VICE PRESIDENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERT. RECEIPT TO DENNIS KEATING RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRWON BUILDING MAINTENANCE DBA ABLE BUILDING MAIN. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT Z-CON BUILDERS INC DENNIS KEATING VICE PRESIDENT $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM PLT AND FORWARDED TO GEORGE HOFFMAN, JUDGE PRO-TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRWON BUILDING MAINTENANCE DBA ABLE BUILDING MAIN. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT Z-CON BUILDERS INC DENNIS KEATING VICE PRESIDENT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, PRIOR JUDGMENT FOR $1000. WAS IN ERROR, IT SHOULD HAVE BEEN $5000. ERROR DUE TO COMPUTING JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
